ChangeRequest.name: AE Requirements - Currency of the amount issued - (CRRNCY_AMNT_ISSD)
ChangeRequest.comment:
# Overview
The variable is used in AE in the context of the "Contingent Encumbrance" template. (For a deeper discussion of the concept of contingency please check ticket #474).
More specifically, the variable "Currency of the amount issued" is relevant in Template F 34.00.c, that requires institutions to report the level of additional asset encumbered under the (fictional) Scenario B.
Scenario B assumes "_A 10% depreciation in each currency in which the institution has aggregate liabilities amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution's total liabilities_" (Annex XVII).
### Contact person
@Arianna.Nuvoli, @Maria_Manuel.Henriques, @Pietro.Ferroni
### Business definition
Please refer to the comments of this issue.
### Legal definition
According to Annex XVII, in this template: _"a currency shall be a significant currency if the reporting institution has aggregate liabilities in that currency amounting to or exceeding 5% of the institution's total liabilities_"
### Reason for inclusion
AE Integration
### Relationships
Please refer to the comments of this issue.
### Relevant Framework/Template
AE (F 34.00.c)
### Additional documentation/links (optional)
_\[Additional info\]_
### Before closing checklist
- [ ] Assignee for review - [ ] Assignee to close - [ ] Other actions
